name: golang-github-gin-gonic-gin-dev
title: golang-github-gin-gonic-gin-dev
summary: HTTP web framework written in Go
description:
HTTP web framework written in Go
Gin is a web framework written in Go (Golang). It features a martini-like API
with much better performance, up to 40 times faster thanks to httprouter. If
you need performance and good productivity, you will love Gin.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-gin-gonic-gin-dev because HTTP web framework written in Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-gin-gonic-gin-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-gin-gonic-gin-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-gin-gonic-gin-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
